data.title: Ethereum NFT platform, Foundation, closes post $230 million NFT sales, faced shutdown from failed Blackdove deal.
data.description: After an unsuccessful acquisition by Blackdove, the organization is ceasing operations. It has facilitated around $230 million in NFT initial sales since its establishment in 2021.

data.title: EFGH and Digital Asset Protection HHP High-Tech Center JSC Form Joint Venture To Build National Blockchain Infrastructure In Vietnam, Partners to Build Five Other Digital Projects
data.description: VNL1 has secured $8 million in funding to develop a blockchain for Vietnam's national product traceability. The investment will also support five other projects in fintech, tourism, commodities, AI computing, and a financial district. The agreement was reached in both Singapore and Ho Chi Minh City.

data.title: ST. GERTRUDE CEMETERY & MAUSOLEUM TO HOST FREE OPEN HOUSE WEEKEND
data.description: A renowned Catholic cemetery located in Colonia, New Jersey, is welcoming families to explore the highly praised Resurrection Chapel Mausoleum. The limited-time 2025 pricing offer for this opportunity will conclude on April 27th. The event will be held by the Catholic Cemeteries of the Archdiocese of Newark and includes a free Open House Weekend at St. Gertrude.

data.title: The Great American Luxury Escape: Why Affluent Travelers Are Rediscovering U.S. Destinations
data.description: The Global Travel Collection has recently announced a significant 20% increase in domestic summer hotel bookings as travelers opt for destinations closer to home. Hawaii, ranch retreats, and New England are the top choices for travelers. This surge in bookings comes amidst economic uncertainty and changing geopolitics impacting travel trends.

data.title: Bruker Expands Industry-Leading MALDI Biotyper® and IR Biotyper® Workflows for Microbial Identification and Outbreak Management
data.description: In Munich, Bruker recently revealed significant updates at ESCMID Global 2026, showcasing advancements in microbial identification, outbreak analysis, and reflex next-generation sequencing (NGS) typing. These enhancements highlight Bruker's dedication to providing cutting-edge solutions for laboratories tackling emerging infectious diseases. The improvements include upgrades to the MALDI Biotyper® Workflow and Identification features, aiming to enhance routine MALDI-TOF processes. The portfolio enhancements are part of Bruker's commitment to offering integrated, high-performance solutions for laboratories worldwide.

data.title: Harbinger Health Presents Multiple Studies at AACR Reinforcing Platform Foundation for RESOLVE™, a New Category for Cancer Detection
data.description: Harbinger Health, a leading biotechnology company based in CAMBRIDGE, Mass., showcased the extensive capabilities of its platform in delivering valuable insights across various cancer types and clinical scenarios where cancer is suspected. The presentations shed light on the potential of Harbinger's technology to offer actionable information. The event took place on April 17, 2026, emphasizing the company's commitment to revolutionizing cancer resolution.

data.title: Bruker Launches MyGenius PRO® High-Throughput Sample-to-Answer Molecular Diagnostics System at ESCMID 2026
data.description: In Munich, at ESCMID Global 2026, the Bruker Microbiology & Infection Diagnostics division of Bruker Corporation (Nasdaq: BRKR) has revealed the European debut of MyGenius PRO®. This innovative system is fully automated and utilizes PCR technology for molecular diagnostics in infectious diseases. The S2A system allows for increased throughput, continuous sample loading, and random-access operation. It marks a significant advancement in diagnostic capabilities.

data.title: Pudu Robotics Announces Strategic Partnership with Gom Schoonhouden B.V. at Interclean Amsterdam 2026, Marking Europe's First Deployment of the AI-Native PUDU BG1 Series
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in Amsterdam, Pudu Robotics, a prominent company in commercial service robotics, revealed a new partnership with Gom Schoonhouden B.V., a leading professional cleaning service provider in the Netherlands. This collaboration was established to enhance their services and bring more innovation to the sector.

data.title: As Clinicians Leave Traditional Medicine to Build a Better Model, Ultralight Raises $9.3M to Power What Comes Next
data.description: In San Francisco, a significant number of doctors are reevaluating their medical practices due to the constraints of the current system. Many entered the field with the intention of helping people but have found themselves navigating high-volume visits and fragmented records. This has led to a rise in disillusionment among physicians, prompting them to consider practicing medicine in a way that aligns with their original intentions. This shift has sparked a movement towards functional, integrative, and longevity medicine, which is now one of the rapidly expanding segments in the medical field.

data.title: RTX's Pratt & Whitney GTF Advantage™ engine certified for Airbus A320neo aircraft family
data.description: Pratt & Whitney, a business of RTX, based in East Hartford, Conn., revealed that the European Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) has granted certification for the GTF AdvantageTM engine to be utilized on the Airbus A320neo family aircraft. GTF AdvantageTM engines are set to start service later this year. This development was shared on April 17, 2026.

data.title: Best State to Start an Online Business (2026): Registered Agents Inc Breaks Down Digital Business Formation Trends by Better Business Advice
data.description: On April 17, 2026, a report revealed that the landscape of entrepreneurship is evolving in the United States, with digital businesses seeing growth in various states. The recent findings from Registered Agents Inc showcase the impact of state policies, legal frameworks, and tax conditions on the decisions of entrepreneurs. This data underscores the importance of considering these factors when establishing a business.
